name: matilha
description: You lead. Agents hunt. A cognitive + methodological harness for building complex AI-assisted projects with phase-gated skills and companion-pack composition.

interface.longDescription: Matilha keeps long-running AI-assisted software work disciplined with phase-aware skills, project state, planning gates, review loops, and reusable methodology artifacts. You keep intent, taste, and verification; agents carry execution.
defaultPrompt: Use Matilha to assess the current project phase and recommend the next gated action.
Use Matilha to turn this feature idea into a phase-gated implementation plan.
Use Matilha to review whether this AI-assisted workflow has enough context, tests, and verification.
